title: Unknown patch paths remain permissive while known paths are strict
description: Known paths (body, readAt, deletedAt) validate types and return invalidArguments on wrong type. Unknown paths still silently pass (// Unknown patch path: ignore (permissive)). This asymmetry is intentional: strict on known fields to catch client bugs, permissive on unknown fields for forward compatibility with new fields. A contributor might suggest 'simplify' by making all unknown paths strict — resist this, it breaks forward compat.
